title: Telis halophila
taxonomy: Telis halophila belongs to the family Eriocaulaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pipewort. This family consists of around 600 species, and they are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Telis halophila is a species of plant that falls under the genus Telis, which is a part of the Eriocaulaceae family. The classification of Telis halophila is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae) and its phylum (Angiospermophyta). The roots of the Telis halophila plant are said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making them useful for treating wounds and skin infections.
